race.comment: BERKELEY SQUARE (1) carries the big weight but deserves to. Is in career best touch and has always suggested he will relish the two miles. Nolen will have him right there from the inside alley. HIGHLAND BLING (6) was well supported in the key lead-up (G3 Lord Reims) and fought stoutly to just miss bob. Fitter third-up and and gets 3kgs off. Expect him to roll across from the wide draw and give a great sight. NEWFOUNDLAND (2) returns for his crack at redemption after placing in the Cup last year. Disappointed at Flemington behind BS but had excuses. Has trialled strongly in-between and can return to somewhere near his best. HURRY CURRY (10) jumps sharply in grade but looks set to relish this rise in trip after a good win at Sandown-Hillside over 2400m. Gets a key booking in J Melham. DICTIONARY (8) was a flashing light behind BS at Flemington. Is another that looks like he will handle the 3200m. KOMACHI (4) gets 3kgs off from the Lord Reims and is sure to push forward and be handy.
